# Prediction Intervals for `uRegress` objects

Produces prediction intervals for objects of class `uRegress`.

## Usage

``` r
# S3 method for class 'uRegress'
predict(object, interval = "prediction", level = 0.95, ...)
```

## Arguments

- object:

  an object of class `uRegress`.

- interval:

  Type of interval calculation

- level:

  Tolerance/confidence level

- ...:

  other arguments to pass to the appropriate predict function for the
  class of `object$fit`. See
  [`predict.lm`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.lm.html), or
  [`predict.glm`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/predict.glm.html) for more
  details.

## Value

Returns a matrix with the fitted value and prediction interval for the
entered X.

## See also

[`regress`](https://statdivlab.github.io/rigr/reference/regress.md)

## Examples

``` r
# Loading required libraries
library(survival)
library(sandwich)

# Reading in a dataset
data(mri)

# Linear regression of LDL on age (with robust SE by default)
testReg <- regress ("mean", ldl~age, data = mri)

# 95% Prediction Interval for age 50
predict(testReg)
#> Warning: predictions on current data refer to _future_ responses
```
